title: Private Playtest Hub and Scenario Gallery
noSavePosture: Rewards, XP, campaign progress, Retinue state, relic state, and reputation are not saved from hub previews.

scenarios.title: Main menu sample
scenarios.purpose: Review the current private-package main menu without starting progression.
scenarios.manualReviewQuestion: Does the first screen make the play path obvious?
scenarios.saveIsolationRule: Private hub preview only. Restore the pre-hub local save before returning; no rewards, XP, progress, Retinue, relic, or reputation mutation is kept.

scenarios.title: Fresh campaign map
scenarios.purpose: Open a fresh safe campaign preview with the first node selected.
scenarios.manualReviewQuestion: Is the map readable at a glance?
scenarios.launchContext: campaign map preview with Salto selected
scenarios.saveIsolationRule: Private hub preview only. Restore the pre-hub local save before returning; no rewards, XP, progress, Retinue, relic, or reputation mutation is kept.
